problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerReceiptAppendWitness defines the receipt append evidence boundary, but terminal closure still needs a schema-backed witness before any runtime worker dispatch can be enabled.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerTerminalClosureWitness validates against a JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the upstream receipt append witness and effect reconciliation witness

the witness requires final judgment evidence, no-unexpected-effect proof, evidence bundle proof, replay verification, terminal closure certificate evidence, WorkerFailureReceipt obligation on error, and trusted runtime clock evidence

the witness keeps terminal closure, runtime dispatch admission, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, filesystem writes, connector calls, network access, secret access, and success claims denied
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing authorization input refs, admission drift, malformed payloads, and summary drift
non_goals: do not perform UAO dispatch authorization
do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not grant filesystem, connector, network, terminal closure, or success-claim authority
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only

runtime dispatch remains blocked until receipt append, final judgment, no-unexpected-effect proof, evidence bundle proof, replay verification, terminal closure certificate, WorkerFailureReceipt, and trusted runtime clock evidence exist
all new artifacts must remain deterministic and read-only
